author: Obsidian
description: Convert your data to Markdown files you can use in Obsidian. Works with Apple Notes, OneNote, Evernote, Notion, Google Keep, and many other formats.

manifest.author: Obsidian
manifest.description: Import data from Notion, Evernote, Apple Notes, Microsoft OneNote, Google Keep, Bear, Roam, Textbundle, CSV, and HTML files.
manifest.name: Importer

name: Importer

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: - Bump dependencies to fix `npm audit` report.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Removed eval() from the bundle by stubbing @protobufjs/inquire, improving security review compliance
 - Added a GitHub release workflow with build attestation
 - Fixed an incorrect moment import that broke CI builds
 - Build/tooling cleanup: switched off builtin-modules, added package manager config, and committed/resolved the pnpm lockfile

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/obsidianmd/obsidian-importer/compare/1.8.10...1.8.11

releases.author: tgrosinger
releases.description: **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/obsidianmd/obsidian-importer/compare/1.8.5...1.8.6

releases.author: tgrosinger
releases.description: Internal changes to resolve warnings about use of innerHTML. There should be no functional differences from this release.

releases.author: tgrosinger
releases.description:
## What's Changed

* Add Apple Journal Importer by @wzs in https://github.com/obsidianmd/obsidian-importer/pull/491
* Upgrade TypeScript, ESLint, typescript-eslint and @types/node by @ikeyan in https://github.com/obsidianmd/obsidian-importer/pull/486
* Make tsconfig stricter and reflect build script by @ikeyan in https://github.com/obsidianmd/obsidian-importer/pull/496
* Migrate legacy ESLint config to flat config (ESLint v9) by @ikeyan in https://github.com/obsidianmd/obsidian-importer/pull/487

## New Contributors
* @wzs made their first contribution in https://github.com/obsidianmd/obsidian-importer/pull/491
* @ikeyan made their first contribution in https://github.com/obsidianmd/obsidian-importer/pull/486

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/obsidianmd/obsidian-importer/compare/1.8.3...1.8.4

releases.author: tgrosinger
releases.description:
## Notion API

  - Set block attachment ctime and mtime
  - Set and preserve file ctime and mtime
  - Attachment import path now follows configured setting by @Xheldon in https://github.com/obsidianmd/obsidian-importer/pull/481
  - Fix toggle blocks with headings and filename creation error by @Xheldon in https://github.com/obsidianmd/obsidian-importer/pull/459

## Apple Notes

  - Escape square brackets
  - Allow skipping notes already imported, and allow setting file name prefix by @jykim in https://github.com/obsidianmd/obsidian-importer/pull/394

## HTML

  - Prevent path traversal outside import directory
  - Do not attempt to download local files

## OneNote

  - Log full error to console when loading pages to import
  - Preserve basic punctuation in img alt text
  - **Support drawings by converting inkml to svg and embedding**

## Bear

  - Improvements to frontmatter, timestamps, and tags

## Evernote

  - Fix path length and error handling by @Xheldon

## Core/General

  - Convert slashes into dashes when sanitizing filenames

## New Contributors
* @jykim made their first contribution in https://github.com/obsidianmd/obsidian-importer/pull/394

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/obsidianmd/obsidian-importer/compare/1.8.2...1.8.3

releases.author: tgrosinger
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* OneNote: Add MathML to LaTeX Conversion by @yuguorui in https://github.com/obsidianmd/obsidian-importer/pull/438
* Notion API: Various bugfixes by @Xheldon in https://github.com/obsidianmd/obsidian-importer/pull/454
* Notion zip: Fix lost file hierarchy by @KimDaegyu-Dev

## New Contributors
* @yuguorui made their first contribution in https://github.com/obsidianmd/obsidian-importer/pull/438

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/obsidianmd/obsidian-importer/compare/1.8.1...1.8.2

releases.author: kepano
releases.description: #451 Bug fixes for Notion API importer

releases.author: kepano
releases.description:
#444 First version of the Notion API importer by @Xheldon including Databases to Bases conversion.

See [documentation](https://help.obsidian.md/import/notion) for how to use it. Importing from Notion is a very complex tasks, so undiscovered edge cases and issues are expected. Please open issues with specific steps to reproduce.

releases.author: tgrosinger
releases.description: New frontmatter features in the Roam importer from @dropcase (#236)

releases.author: tgrosinger
releases.description:
Several OneNote importer bug fixes from @p3rid0t via #209.

* [Importer gets OneNote section names but does not import the notes #109](https://github.com/obsidianmd/obsidian-importer/issues/109)
* [[OneNote] Importer does not back off, leading to rate limiting #120](https://github.com/obsidianmd/obsidian-importer/issues/120)
* [[OneNote] Importer not working properly - "File already exists" #126](https://github.com/obsidianmd/obsidian-importer/issues/126)
* [[OneNote] Nested Section Groups Under Nested Sections Groups Not Discovered #162](https://github.com/obsidianmd/obsidian-importer/issues/162)
* [[OneNote] import while maintaining the hierarchy of notes #165](https://github.com/obsidianmd/obsidian-importer/issues/165)
* [[OneNote] Import of note will be capped at the point where a YouTube embedding is   #166](https://github.com/obsidianmd/obsidian-importer/issues/166)
* [[OneNote] Attachment imports fail for duplicate file names #198](https://github.com/obsidianmd/obsidian-importer/issues/198)

releases.author: kepano
releases.description:
Many Evernote fixes by @akosbalasko via #207

- Removed file name from note body, matching other importers
- #24, #187 Add support for nested tags and folders (notebook stacks), [see documentation](https://help.obsidian.md/import/evernote)
- #26 Use correct formatting for tags front matter metadata
- #190 File name of a resource is cut off at the first dot
- #200 Imported notes do not include source links
- #201 Import loses files with the .dxf extension

Also includes a general fix by @lishid for #161 improve file name sanitization

releases.author: kepano
releases.description: Apple Notes #183 add support for older drawings

releases.author: kepano
releases.description:
Notion improvements #152 by @joshuatazrein 

- #83 Fix "folder already exists"
- #87 Fix folders starting with `.`
- #110 Naming error for files with a slash
- #111 Convert tags with spaces
- #112 Bookmark conversion for youtu.be links
- #114 Clarify docs for Notion export
- #150 Support for single line breaks
- #92 Support for callouts

Also:

- #174 Hide "Processing" once import is complete @kuredev 
- #155 Apple Notes: don't skip first line when there is no second line @mirnovov
- #163 Apple Notes: improve compatibility for older versions of macOS @mirnovov

releases.author: kepano
releases.description: - Fix #159, due to missing dependencies

releases.author: kepano
releases.description:
Merges #146 with various fixes for Apple Notes, thanks to @mirnovov

- Closes #143 support for relative attachment paths
- Closes #144 handling folder errors and escaping folder names
- Closes #148 include handwriting detected in drawings, and fix attachments folder
- Fix issues with trash folder with multiple accounts
- Make importer more robust by not relying on SQLite columns that are likely to change in future macOS versions.
- Fixes issues with SQL statements that have empty arrays

releases.author: kepano
releases.description: Fix #138 failure to load on mobile via #140

releases.author: kepano
releases.description:
- Apple Notes: improved support for internal links #136 by @mirnovov 
- Apple Notes: improved support for drawings and scans #137 by @mirnovov

releases.author: tgrosinger
releases.description:

* Bear: Only remove first heading if it matches filename by @tgrosinger in https://github.com/obsidianmd/obsidian-importer/pull/132
* Add Apple Notes support by @mirnovov in https://github.com/obsidianmd/obsidian-importer/pull/125

## New Contributors
* @sayzard made their first contribution in https://github.com/obsidianmd/obsidian-importer/pull/121
* @puffo made their first contribution in https://github.com/obsidianmd/obsidian-importer/pull/127
* @mirnovov made their first contribution in https://github.com/obsidianmd/obsidian-importer/pull/125

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/obsidianmd/obsidian-importer/compare/1.4.0...1.5.0

releases.author: tgrosinger
releases.description:
## What's Changed

* Fix newlines in notion codeblocks by @joshuatazrein in https://github.com/obsidianmd/obsidian-importer/pull/118
* OneNote bug squashing by @p3rid0t in https://github.com/obsidianmd/obsidian-importer/pull/116

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/obsidianmd/obsidian-importer/compare/1.3.1...1.4.0

releases.author: kepano
releases.description:
- New Microsoft OneNote importer, thanks to @p3rid0t, #51 #91 — see [OneNote import guide](https://help.obsidian.md/import/onenote) for details
- Styling improvements, and make import failure log selectable #88
- Notion import bug fixes, thanks to @joshuatazrein, #90
  - #81 Equations
  - #82 Code blocks
  - #76 Bookmarks formatting
  - #75 Support for toggle headings

releases.author: ericaxu
releases.description:
- New Roam importer! (#50, #85)
- [Notion importer: Don't check for notion ID when looking for zips](https://github.com/obsidianmd/obsidian-importer/commit/ae0ca78f410b8d0a0f4472325c1d9253de7e6848)

releases.author: kepano
releases.description:
- Closes #77 — improve issues with large imports from Notion hanging
- Closes #69 — fix issues with Notion checkboxes & lists

releases.author: ericaxu
releases.description:
- Improve progress status reporting.
- Improve Notion importer.
- Improve Google Keep importer.
- Support cancelling halfway through the import.
- Import now automatically cancels when the modal is closed.

Thanks @joshuatazrein @JeromeZephyr @daledesilva for your contributions!

releases.author: ericaxu
releases.description:
New documentation and import guides available on the official Help site: https://help.obsidian.md/import

- Support importing from **Notion** (credits to @joshuatazrein )
- Support importing from **Google Keep**  (credits to @daledesilva )
- Support importing from **Bear** (credits to @arthurtyukayev)
- Support HTML attachments (credits to @polyipseity )
- Show progress bar and file count as import happens

releases.author: ericaxu
releases.description:
- Files that cause skips and errors are now listed.
- Dev: selected folders are now accessible as `this.folderPaths` on `FormatImporter` classes.

releases.author: ericaxu
releases.description:
- Both Evernote and HTML importers let you choose either importing individual files or entire folders
- Only the files matching the .enex or .html extension in that directory would get imported
releases.name: 1.0.3: Support import entire folders

releases.author: ericaxu
releases.description: You can now import multiple Evernote files at once!
releases.name: 1.0.2: Import multiple Evernote files
